cxu_object.claim: The fear and greed signal provides lightweight contrarian sentiment projections from the Crypto Fear and Greed Index where extreme fear suggests a potential buying opportunity and extreme greed suggests a potential selling opportunity but this signal is slow-moving and best used as a macro backdrop rather than a trade trigger

supporting_contexts.text: Fear and greed signal consumes the external Crypto Fear & Greed Index (0-100 scale: 0=extreme fear, 100=extreme greed) and applies contrarian logic — extreme fear projects upward reversion, extreme greed projects downward reversion. The index updates roughly daily, making it unsuitable for short-horizon timing but valuable as a macro sentiment backdrop.

Key metadata: fearGreedIndex (0-100 value), classification (extreme_fear/fear/neutral/greed/extreme_greed), sourceTimestamp (when the index was last updated). Minimum horizon: 5m (1m suppressed unless high-quality fresh data). Best used at 15m-1h as a confirming or contradicting signal against other technical signals, not as a primary trade driver. The signal's value is in preventing trades against extreme market sentiment.

primaryHorizon.description: Best used at longer horizons as macro backdrop

trustLevel.description: Slow-moving, best as confirming signal not primary driver

version.change_description: Initial signal type CxU from fear-greed signal spec
